calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Smv Industries, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Tuttle, Esq. (510-848-8880) of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Smv Industries, Inc.

Plaintiff John Moore's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant SMV Industries, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed in open court. (see scanned order and judgment for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No: 6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
